headline: Is Boston Scientific (BSX) Still One of the Best Stocks to Invest In After Jefferies Slashed Its Target?
summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) is one of the best stocks to invest in according to Two Sigma Advisors with huge upside potential. headline: Boston Scientific (BSX) Stock Could Be A Bargain After A 57% Slump
summary: Boston Scientific stock has fallen 56.5% over the past year, yet the valuation checks still lean toward the shares looking cheap relative to fundamentals and recent news has put a fresh spotlight on whether that gap is justified. The 56.5% one year share price decline raises the question of whether Boston Scientific is being priced for a much weaker outlook than its long term potential would suggest. On one side, the US$1.5b investment in MiRus and option to acquire its TAVR business may...
